# CutMyAWS.com

> Business-aligned AWS cost optimization for small businesses spending $10-150K/mo on AWS.

## What is CutMyAWS?

CutMyAWS is an AWS cost optimization consulting service run by David Plappert, a Senior AWS Serverless Architect with 19 years of experience. Unlike dashboards and SaaS tools, CutMyAWS is a real person who reads your architecture, understands your business, and aligns your tech to how your business actually works. The cost savings are a side effect of getting that alignment right.

## Who is it for?

Small and medium businesses spending $10,000 to $150,000 per month on AWS. Below $10K there isn't enough waste to justify an engagement. Above $150K you likely need a full-time FinOps team.

## How does it work?

1. **Intro Call** ($99 down payment, 15 min): Book a call, grant read-only AWS access, meet David.
2. **Exploration Call** (5-10 business days later): David presents full findings — every waste item, dollar amounts, architecture recommendations, business alignment analysis. Fee: 15% of identified annual savings (minus the $99).
3. **Implementation** (optional): David implements all optimizations. Custom timeline and deliverables agreed together. Fee: +20% of verified savings, due 90 days after deliverables. 35% total maximum.

## Pricing

- $99 down payment (credited toward audit fee)
- The Report: 15% of annual savings found
- The Fix: 35% total max (15% report + 20% implementation)
- Implementation fee based on verified savings only — 90 days after deliverables
- No savings = no fee for implementation

## What makes CutMyAWS different?

- Real human, not a dashboard or AI tool
- 19 years of AWS experience
- Business-aligned: finds the mismatch between tech and business, not just billing waste
- Serverless architecture expertise (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, SES)
- Transparent pricing published on website
- Performance-based implementation fee (pay only on verified results)
- Read-only access only for audit phase
